alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 5 at 10:28PM EST until March 6 at 12:00PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow and sleet
accumulations of a coating to 2 inches in western MA, up to 4
inches in northeastern MA with isolated 5-6 inch amounts not of
out of the question near the New Hampshire border. Ice
accumulations around one tenth of an inch in both regions.

* WHERE...Portions of northern Connecticut, eastern, northeastern,
and western Massachusetts, and northern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...Until noon EST Friday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The Friday morning
commute will be impacted.

nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 8am, then rain showers and a chance of drizzle between 8am and 1pm, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers and a chance of drizzle between 1pm and 4pm, then areas of fog and a chance of drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 35. Northeast wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog and a chance of drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog and a chance of drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain between 8am and noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. South wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before 7pm, then a chance of rain and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 42. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 53. West wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 38. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 56. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 58. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 3am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 39. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 51. Southeast wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 37. West wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 47. Northwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 11pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind around 12 mph.
